reason: Source constrains BinCode strictly to 6-digit BINs (< 10,000,000), but the claimed description expands scope to include 8-digit BINs (>= 10,000,000), which is not supported by the source.
proposed_fix: 6-digit Bank Identification Number (BIN) identifying the issuing bank; constrained to values < 10,000,000 per CHK_CountryBin6. Part of composite PK and indexed by IX_DCNB_Bincode (Tier 1 - Dictionary.CountryBin6)
